markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on 2026 content strategy and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot → TTS:** Shift content focus from STT to Text-to-Speech (TTS), Deepgram's newer product. The goal is to build an original narrative around enterprise use cases (e.g., healthcare) rather than just competing on voice quality with 11 Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Content Mix → DevRel:** Prioritize developer-focused content on integrations (AWS, Google Cloud) over competitive articles. This strategy aims to tap into larger developer ecosystems and boost social media reach.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**KPI → Console Signups:** Console signups are the primary North Star KPI, as they directly feed the product-led growth (PLG) motion. The current $165k in influenced pipeline is a positive indicator, but the main goal is driving brute-force traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**AIO Tracking → New Tool:** A new, daily-updated AIO tracking tool was launched to provide granular, prompt-level visibility into Deepgram's AI search presence against competitors, enabling more data-driven content decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Priorities

  - [**Problem:** The current content mix is too focused on STT and competitive articles.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to support Deepgram's newer TTS product and expand its developer audience.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**TTS Focus:** Build an original narrative beyond voice quality.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [Differentiate on enterprise use cases: healthcare, urgent life-critical applications.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
          - [Highlight technical superiority: 5 nines of word error rate (WER) accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**DevRel Focus:** Create content on integrations with major platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [AWS (Transcribe, SageMaker)](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [Google Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [OpenAI Whisper](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Tap into larger developer pools and boost social media reach via platform tags.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
      - [**Deprioritized:** Industry-specific content (health tech, QSR) and competitive articles on smaller players (AssemblyAI).](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Performance & KPI Alignment

  - [**Current Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Organic Traffic:** Strong growth, with a new weekly high.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Influenced Pipeline:** $165k from 8 opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [**AIO Referrals:** 400+ from AI search platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**North Star KPI:** Console signups.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Directly feeds the PLG motion. The sales cycle is too long for SQLs to be the primary metric.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**New AIO Tracking Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Function:** Provides daily, prompt-level visibility into AI search presence.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Insight:** Identifies content gaps by showing where competitors rank for specific queries.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [**Status:** Launched today; access will be shared with the Deepgram team.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### Operational Adjustments

  - [**Article Refresh Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
      - **Problem:** A new "Speech-to-Text APIs Comparison" article was published as a net new post, risking cannibalization of the original article's \#6 Google ranking.
      - [**Solution:** Replace the old article with the new content at the same URL to preserve its SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
      - [**Decision:** Maintain the current \~15 articles/month pace.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritize quality over quantity to establish a strong growth rate for the new TTS content.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [**Long-Form Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [**Idea:** Develop downloadable lead-gen assets for business leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Leverage the annual "State of Voice AI" report (typically April/May) as a central hub for related content.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Replace the old "Speech-to-Text APIs Comparison" article with the new content at the original URL.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Publish remaining competitive articles from the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for the new TTS content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [Schedule a strategy session with Corey (new DevRel lead) to align on developer content needs.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
      - [Share access to the new AIO tracking tool with the Deepgram team.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [**Troy:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [Prepare prompts and themes for the new TTS content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [Confirm the timeline and scope for the annual "State of Voice AI" report.](https://fathom.video/share/z3xB9czfL2eqi2hcPtJKzBKD_UmBbwpE?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)
